sections.paragraph:
Σαλωμών (LXX; s. Thackeray 165; Christian magical pap: PGM II, P 17, 10 p. 226 [Henrichs]) Ac 7:47 Tdf.; s. Σολομών.

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Thackeray Thackeray = HT., A Grammar of the OT in Greek according to the Septuagint—List 6

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

Tdf. Tdf. = CvTischendorf—List 1, beg.

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 912
